description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the perl Docker image and defines a single stage called test. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, executes the before_script commands: perl -v, curl -sL --compressed https://git.io/cpm > cpm, chmod +x cpm, ./cpm install -g, ./cpm install Devel::Cover -g, ./cpm install Minilla -g, and then runs minil test as its script. Configure the job to run on all branches except master using an except rule. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are needed.
